title: Gold hits record high amid rising expectations of rate cuts
section_path: Gold hits record high amid rising expectations of rate cuts
section_path_text: Gold hits record high amid rising expectations of rate cuts
summary:
Main
A stronger USD created headwinds for commodity markets. Concerns over demand in China continue to weigh on sentiment. By Daniel Hynes
Image reference: Στιγμιότυπο οθόνης 2024-07-17 114228.png | assets/2024-07-17_gold-hits-record-high-amid-rising-expectations-of-rate-cuts_img_cea3cf84ceb9ceb3cebcceb9cf8ccf84cf85_a5876aee8964.png

Market Commentary
Gold extended recent gains to reach another record high as the market increased its bets on a Fed rate cut.

children.title: Main
children.summary: A stronger USD created headwinds for commodity markets. Concerns over demand in China continue to weigh on sentiment.

children.title: Market Commentary
children.summary: Gold extended recent gains to reach another record high as the market increased its bets on a Fed rate cut. The move has been ignited by signs of slowing inflation.
